title: Nexus Agent Tracker
description: Schema for .nexus/state/agent-tracker.json — registry of spawned agent instances tracked across a session

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this agent instance was first started

last_resumed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent resume, if the agent has been resumed

resume_count.description: Number of times this agent instance has been resumed

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the agent instance

stopped_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the agent completed or was stopped

last_message.description: Last recorded output or status message from the agent

files_touched.description: Paths of files created or modified by this agent instance
